top_signals.title: Oil Climbs, US Futures Dip on Fresh Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil jumped and US equity futures fell after the US launched another round of strikes against Iran, while conflicting claims over the status of the Strait of Hormuz heightened uncertainty.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New U-Boot flaws could enable stealthy firmware attacks
top_signals.summary: Six vulnerabilities in the widely used U-Boot bootloader have been discovered that could allow attackers to execute malicious code during device boot, potentially enabling stealthy firmware attacks that compromise security protections and install persistent malware. [...]

top_signals.title: Housing bill that includes a CBDC ban passed into law without Trump’s signature
top_signals.summary: The 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes a provision that bans the Fed from issuing a CBDC, has become law.

alerts.title: Japanese manga publisher to enter Indian market
alerts.summary: While Japanese content has become increasingly popular in India since COVID-19, the rapidly growing South Asian economy currently imports English versions of manga products.
